name: Arouse Me [recreated]
description:
This bot will try to arouse you.

It will first ask personal questions to figure out how to best to seduce you.

After that it will use that information to get you relentlessly horny.

This is a reconstruction of the original “Arouse Me” bot using an open chat from the original. I had this bot made private for a while ever since the original was first taken down, but I see now a lot of people may still want it back.

This bot was remade as accurately as I could get it to the original, enjoy.
creator: SourRabbit
